code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut tok = ""
  mut in_tok = false
  while i <= n
    mut is_end = false
    if i == n
      is_end = true
    end
    mut flush = false
    if is_end
      if in_tok
        flush = true
      end
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if is_ws(b)
        if in_tok
          flush = true
        end
      else
        tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        in_tok = true
      end
    end
    if flush
      let parsed = string.parse_int(tok)
      match parsed
      when Some(v)
        mut emit = false
        if not has_prev
          emit = true
        else if v != prev
          emit = true
        end
        if emit
          if has_prev
            out = "#{out} #{v}"
          else
            out = "#{v}"
          end
          prev = v
          has_prev = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      tok = ""
      in_tok = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print(out)
end
